instruction: Open System Settings, go to Appearance, and set Dark Mode {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 AX-tree, §7). Verified via the live AX switch value, the macOS analogue of OSWorld check_accessibility_tree.

args: defaults write com.apple.guibench AppleInterfaceStyleSwitch -int {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.guibench AppleInterfaceStyleSwitch -int {WANT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
